name: SEO Article Audit
description: Two-layer audit for backlink SEO articles. Layer 1: 11 deterministic mechanical checks (word count, anchor placement, trustlink validity, forbidden phrases, paragraph count). Layer 2: 8 editorial quality dimensions (hook, thesis, entity integration, trustlink quality, anchor naturalness, red thread, closing quality, AI smell). Produces structured report with ratings, quoted evidence, actionable fixes, and a PUBLISH-READY / REVISE-THEN-PUBLISH / REWRITE-REQUIRED verdict.
